title: ITR filing 2026: What salaried employees should check in AIS and Form 26AS before submitting returns
summary: As the ITR filing season for 2026-27 begins, salaried employees must review their AIS and Form 26AS for accurate income reporting. The ITR deadline is 31 July 2026, with a belated return option until 31 December 2026.

title: UPI ID blocked due to cybercrime complaint? Here’s how to recover your account and restore access
summary: UPI remains the top payment method, but rising cybercrime cases may lead to account suspensions, despite the user being innocent. Here are the steps users can take to protect themselves or recover their UPI account in case it gets blocked due to fraudulent transactions.

title: High equity taxes dampen market sentiment amid FII outflows, West Asia war: What should investors do?

title: What NRIs should know about gift received from grandparents
summary: While ITA 1961 did not expressly clarify whether the term covered maternal as well as paternal relatives, there are judicial precedents supporting the view that the expression includes both maternal and paternal lineal ascendants and descendants.

title: How credit card interest works: Even a ₹100 unpaid bill can hurt your pocket
summary: Credit cards allow users to borrow money up to a limit, offering convenience and rewards. They provide an interest-free period if the full balance is paid by the due date, but unpaid amounts can incur interest on both the existing balance and new transactions.

title: Zero balance savings accounts for kids: Top five banks where you can save your child’s pocket money
summary: Parents can teach children the value of saving with zero balance savings accounts from various banks in India. These accounts offer features like parental controls, debit cards, and mobile banking, helping children manage their finances and develop saving habits early on. Details here.

title: Mutual Fund Returns Explained: CAGR vs XIRR vs Rolling Returns — how each metric impacts investment outcome
summary: Mutual fund returns explained: CAGR vs XIRR vs rolling returns highlights key differences in measuring growth, SIP performance and consistency. The final investment decision should be made after proper due diligence and consultation with a certified financial advisor.&nbsp;

title: Why finding the right insurance agent matters as much as choosing the best policy
summary: While aggregators may be cheaper, a dedicated agent provides vital advocacy during claim disputes and disclosures. But since commission structures make it nearly impossible to switch agents later, here's how to make the right choice.

title: Rising milk, petrol and vegetable prices: Does this justify a higher DA hike in July 2026?
summary: Rising milk, vegetable, petrol and CNG prices have intensified inflation concerns across the country, increasing expectations of a reasonable July 2026 DA hike for central government employees and pensioners.

title: White House reviews ban on trading through best price on stocks
summary: The White House is reviewing a long-standing stock trading rule aimed at ensuring investors get the best prices. title: Warsh to be sworn in as Fed chair at White House on Friday, Fox Business reports
summary: Kevin Warsh is set to take over as U.S. Federal Reserve chair following Senate approval, with his swearing-in scheduled at the White House. His leadership comes at a critical time as the Fed navigates persistent inflation and pressure over interest rate cuts, marking a shift from the Powell era.

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Tuesday
summary: Indian indices were subdued with Nifty up 0.03% and Sensex down 0.10%. High volatility (VIX at 19.63) and bearish momentum indicators suggest near-term weakness. Analysts expect Nifty to trade between 23,300–23,800, with resistance near 23,650 and key selling pressure visible.

title: Sebi proposes easing call recording rules for research analysts dealing with institutional investors
summary: SEBI proposes relaxing mandatory call recording requirements for research analysts when dealing with institutional investors to reduce compliance burdens. The proposal recognizes institutional clients as sophisticated entities.

title: Market Trading Guide: Buy PB Fintech, GE Shipping on Tuesday for gains up to 12%
summary: Nifty recovered but volatility persists, with resistance at 23,650. Analysts recommend buying PB Fintech (Policybazaar) at Rs 1,749 for an 8% upside and GE Shipping at Rs 1,700 for a 12% upside, citing strong technical breakouts and momentum.

title: IGL Q4 Results: Cons PAT falls 25% YoY to Rs 341 crore, revenue up 6%
summary: Indraprastha Gas Limited (IGL) reported a Q4FY26 net profit fall of 25% YoY to Rs 341 crore, driven by an 8% growth in expenses. Despite the profit dip, revenue increased 6% to Rs 4,585 crore. The company board also recommended a final dividend of 75% for the financial year 2025-26.

title: NextEra Energy strikes $66.8 billion deal for Dominion in bets on AI power demand
summary: The deal, one of the largest in the U.S. power industry, adds to a wave of consolidation as the rapid data-center buildout lifts power demand for the first time in two decades, opening up a lucrative revenue stream and boosting profit prospects.
